regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-06-27. 10Y Treasury yield 4.39% (7-week low; positive PCE data limited rate-hike expectations, a modest macro tailwind). DXY 101.37 (essentially flat vs prior 101.43; still elevated near 13-month high). Fed held at 3.5-3.75% in June meeting under new Chair Kevin Warsh; BofA forecasts 3 rate hikes in 2026 (target 4.25-4.50%), though PCE softness challenges that outlook. Crypto: BTC $60,194 (+1.34% 24h) — rebounding from $58,773 low; ETH $1,578.95 (+2.16%); SOL $71.57 (+4.33%). Fear and Greed 15 (Extreme Fear, persistent). Total crypto mcap $2.16T (+1.48% 24h); BTC dominance 55.80% (stable). Equities: SPY $728.99 (-0.72% Fri close); MSFT $372.97 (+5.71% on positive PCE data + Michael Burry disclosed long call positions); NVDA $192.53 (-1.64%); GOOGL $337.39 (-1.84%); UNH $427.89 (+2.97% defensive bid). GLD $373.63 (+1.13% on yield softening). Crypto sleeve 19.26% of NAV (within 20% neutral cap — no room to add crypto). Cash 14.06% of NAV (well above 5% floor). NAV $96,035.56 (+$920.80 from yesterday). Zero trades: MSFT bounce is encouraging but one PCE print; BofA rate-hike risk + persistent Extreme Fear = NEUTRAL maintained; crypto sleeve near cap prohibits BTC addition; all stock theses intact above invalidation levels; hold dry powder pending clearer regime signal.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $728.99 (below $741.75 avgCost; -1.72%). Broad index resilient despite Fed hawkishness; PCE data positive; sector rotation supporting breadth. Hold as diversified US equity anchor.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed multi-hike path forcing a technical downtrend in the broad index.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $192.53 (below $208.44 avgCost; -7.63%). Continuing broad tech pressure but AI capex cycle and data-center demand intact. Micron AI memory strength confirms demand side; holding through volatility.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below 150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $372.97 (below $391.98 avgCost; -4.85%). Michael Burry disclosed large long call positions; positive PCE data triggered +5.71% recovery. Azure + Copilot revenue growing. Thesis firmly intact.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $337.39 (below $366.53 avgCost; -7.96%). Declining for several sessions; monitoring distance to $310 invalidation. Search monopoly and cloud revenue dominant — thesis intact but watching closely.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals causing revenue decline; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $427.89 (above $408.52 avgCost; +4.73% profit, 6.54% NAV). Healthcare defensives benefiting from rotation away from growth risk during rate-hike fears. Serves as ballast. HOLD.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $373.63 (below $386.54 avgCost; -3.34%, 4.30% NAV). Yield softening to 4.39% is a tailwind; geopolitical risk still supportive. Small position limits NAV drag. HOLD.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with strong USD reversal sustained; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $60,194 (below $64,629 avgCost; -6.87%, 14.06% NAV). Rebounding from $58,773 low; F&G 15 (Extreme Fear) is historically contrarian bullish; BTC dominance 55.80% stable. Crypto sleeve near 20% neutral cap — cannot add without breaching cap. Hold; await risk-on regime for deployment.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,578.95 (below $1,667.47 avgCost; -5.30%, 3.95% NAV). ETH dominance 8.81%; recovering +2.16% today alongside crypto market bounce. Asymmetric upside when risk-on returns. Small position appropriate.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $71.57 (above $67.81 avgCost; +5.55% profit, 1.26% NAV). Strong +4.33% day. Small position to capture upside when regime flips to risk-on and crypto sleeve cap expands to 35%.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
